title: BOCRA Annual Report 2024
description: BOCRA's latest annual report covering regulatory activities, strategic milestones, financial performance, spectrum management, complaints resolved, and sector highlights for 2024.

title: BOCRA Annual Report 2025
description: The most recent annual report detailing BOCRA's regulatory achievements, digital economy milestones, consumer protection outcomes, and financial statements.

title: BOCRA Annual Report 2023
description: 2023 annual report covering spectrum auctions, 5G preparedness, UASF-funded school connectivity projects, and Botswana's digital economy progress.

title: BOCRA Annual Report 2022
description: Full regulatory report for 2022 including CRA Regulations update, market liberalisation milestones, consumer complaint statistics, and broadcasting sector developments.

title: BOCRA Annual Report 2021
description: 2021 annual report documenting BOCRA's pandemic-era regulatory response, sector resilience, COVID-19 public communications support, and strategic plan progress.

title: BOCRA Annual Report 2018
description: Historical annual report documenting BOCRA's early strategic milestones, market liberalisation efforts, spectrum management, and stakeholder engagement activities.

title: Broadband Facts and Figures 2021
description: Third edition of BOCRA's annual broadband market report covering fixed and mobile broadband coverage, speeds, pricing trends, and COVID-19 impact on connectivity in Botswana.

title: Broadband Facts and Figures — Inaugural Edition
description: BOCRA's inaugural broadband market report — the first of its kind in the SADC region. Covers fixed broadband solutions, adoption rates, pricing, and market structure.

title: Communications Regulatory Authority Act 2012
description: The principal legislation establishing BOCRA, defining its mandate, powers, enforcement authority, and the regulatory framework for all communications services in Botswana.

title: Electronic Communications and Transactions Act 2014
description: Governs electronic signatures, digital contracts, accreditation of authentication service providers, and the legal validity of electronic records in Botswana courts.

title: National Cybersecurity Strategy 2023–2028
description: Botswana's five-year national strategy for building cyber resilience across government, industry, and civil society — coordinated by BOCRA.

title: BOCRA Annual Report 2015
description: Early foundational annual report documenting BOCRA's establishment milestones, initial licensing activities, and sector development in Botswana's communications industry.
